name: JSON Formatter
description: Parse, validate, and beautify JSON data. Includes a tree view for easy navigation.

name: HTTP Client
description: A powerful REST API client for testing endpoints. Supports GET, POST, PUT, DELETE.

name: JWT Decoder/Encoder
description: Decode, verify signatures (HS256), and generate JSON Web Tokens.

name: Base64 Converter
description: Encode/Decode Base64 strings. Supports file upload for encoding and file download for decoding.

name: Password Generator
description: Create strong, secure passwords with customizable character sets and length.

name: UUID Generator
description: Generate UUID v4/v7 and extract hidden timestamps from v7 IDs.

name: Timestamp Converter
description: Convert between Unix timestamps (s/ms/ns) and RFC3339Nano date strings.

name: String Hash & Crypto
description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, Hex, and Base64 hashes.

name: URL Encoder/Decoder
description: Encode text to URL-safe format or decode URLs back to plain text.

name: Bcrypt Generator & Checker
description: Generate secure Bcrypt password hashes and verify passwords against hashes.

name: String Case Converter
description: Convert text string to Uppercase, Lowercase, Title Case, CamelCase, Slug, and more.

name: Markdown Viewer & Editor
description: View, edit, and AI-format Markdown files. Supports file I/O and live preview.

name: HTML Viewer & Editor
description: Edit HTML with Live Preview, Tree View, Beautify, and Minify tools.

name: HTML Encode / Decode
description: Escape special characters to HTML entities or decode entities back to text.

name: String Escaper
description: Escape/Unescape strings for HTML, XML, JavaScript, JSON, SQL, and CSV.

name: String Length & Tokens
description: Calculate characters, words, lines, byte size, and estimate AI tokens.

name: XML Formatter
description: View, edit, validate, and format XML data. Includes tree view visualization.

name: Text Cleaner & Formatter
description: Sanitize text, remove duplicates/accents, and format multiline content.

name: Text Replacer
description: Generate text dynamically from templates using {{variable}} syntax placeholders.

name: JSON Log Analyzer
description: Tabular view and detailed inspector for structured JSON logs (SQL, API types).

name: Snowflake ID
description: Generate and analyze Twitter Snowflake IDs (64-bit unique identifiers).

name: AI OCR Scanner
description: Extract text from images using AI. Supports file upload and clipboard paste.

name: AI Smart Translator
description: Context-aware translation with strict language enforcement using AI.

name: AI Text Summarizer
description: Summarize text with different modes (Key points, Shortest, Detailed) and auto-translate.

name: Smart Chat Reply
description: Upload chat screenshots or paste logs to get AI-suggested replies in various styles.

name: AI Email Generator
description: Generate professional business emails in seconds. Customize tone, language, and context.

name: Chat to Article
description: Convert messy AI chat logs into structured, clean technical articles using AI.

name: AI Transcriber
description: Transcribe audio/video to Text, JSON, or SRT with auto-translation using AI.

name: Markdown Parser
description: Convert HTML, plain text, website URLs, and files (DOC, XLSX, PDF) to clean Markdown format.
